ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the supplier (e.g., Net 30, COD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program the customer is enrolled in (e.g., Silver, Gold) */,
  "points_balance" INTEGER /* Points balance in the customer's loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "reel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reel in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reel ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the reel */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the reel (if any) */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal for the reel (quantity * price_per_unit * discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipment */,
  "ship_to_name" TEXT /* Name of the person or business the shipment is addressed to */,
  "ship_to_address" TEXT /* Address the shipment is being sent to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reel_suppliers" (
  "reel_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reel-supplier relationship */,
  "reel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reel supplied */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the reel */,
  "supply_date" TEXT /* Date the reel was supplied */,
  "supply_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reel supplied */,
  "supply_price" TEXT /* Price at which the reel was supplied */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to restock the reel (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reel_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reel_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "reel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reel for which the log entry is recorded */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., Add, Remove) */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Quantity change (positive for addition, negative for removal) */,
  "new_quantity" INTEGER /* New quantity after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., Stock received, Sale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user role (e.g., Read, Write, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the user's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code for the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id")
)
